disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Very fast, steady, regular pounding heartbeat that began abruptly at rest
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your heartbeat feels like?
Did it come on gradually or all at once?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on all at once while I was sitting still — it's a really fast, steady pounding, like a machine gun in my chest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness / feeling dizzy during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded?
Do you feel like you might faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I feel quite dizzy and lightheaded, but I haven't actually fainted.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild breathlessness on moving around during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make it feel worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I get a bit puffed and more breathless when I get up and move around the apartment.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent brief self-terminating episodes of a racing heart over the past year
trigger_question_examples: How long do these episodes usually last?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, my heart has done this maybe 3 or 4 times over the last year, but those only lasted a minute or two and stopped by themselves.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: This episode has lasted over 30 minutes and has not self-terminated
trigger_question_examples: How long has this episode been going?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: This one has been going for more than half an hour now and it just won't stop — that's why I'm worried, it's never lasted this long.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels anxious, sweaty and clammy during the episode
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm really anxious and sweaty, my hands are a bit shaky — I feel quite worked up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High caffeine intake today — several coffees while studying
trigger_question_examples: Have you had much coffee, tea or energy drinks today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had several coffees today while I was studying — probably more than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain and no loss of consciousness
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain?
Have you passed out or blacked out at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No real chest pain, just the pounding — and no, I haven't passed out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications and no recreational stimulant use
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications?
Have you taken anything recreational or any stimulants?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't take any regular medicines, and no, I haven't taken anything like that.
